name: Alibaba Group — ecosystem orchestrator
description: Single high-level BMC capturing the parent group's role as orchestrator across multiple sub-businesses. The case shows how Customer Segments split into B2B / B2C / C2C / merchant / financial layers, how Revenue Streams aggregate across marketplace commissions + advertising fees + Ant Group financial services + Cloud SaaS, and how Key Resources (shared user identity, shared logistics, shared data) make the group's orchestrator role real. AliExpress and Cainiao are the deeper sub-business cases.
